title: Luffy Is Mistaken for the Fake Captain
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #1, Nami, Marines, Fake Luffy, Narrator, Luffy. The core story beat is luffy is mistaken for the fake captain.
scene: The scene centers on luffy is mistaken for the fake captain, with Fake Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #1, Nami, Marines, Fake Luffy, Narrator, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why're they randomly calling me their boss...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Like I said, what are you even talking about...?

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: You idiots!! Who told you to charge at them?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: It's the Pacifista AAAAAAs!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: What're the Marine's Elite Human Weapons from the Ultimate War doing in a place like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Luffy
dialogue.text: pirate "Straw hat Luffy" identified.

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: A... A Pacifista...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BIBIP

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: A real pacifista?! and it's aiming..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bounty 88,000,000 Bell... Lip "Service" DHOT.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Captain Dhot!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: No way...!! Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAR ghh...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An Eighty- Million Man... Taken out like he was nothing...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: It's no good, big boss!! You have gotta do something!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: These human weapons are gonna kill us all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Huh?! Where's big boss Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hurry it up!! We're gettin' outta here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't fight the kind of monsters who can take out Dhot!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! Big boss straw hat is gonna fight for us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take 'em out!! Show them the power of a four-hundred- million man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are these people calling you "Straw hat"...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, BIG GUY!! Don't you know who you're talking to?! If you don't want to have your chest torn open and your insides ripped out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then get outta my way!! I'm the son of dragon!! The grandson of GARP!! I'm the four-hundred- million man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Straw hat is not a piece of worthless trash like you!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BUEEE GGHH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaaaaaa?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: B - B - Big Boss Straw Haaaat?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fake Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: B - B - Big Boss Straw Hat?!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: PX-S. Who is this man?

summary: Luffy Is Mistaken for the Fake Captain. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
